goal: fin_matrix_entry[S](m, n, a, i, k) * (fin_matrix_entry[S](n, p, b, k, j) + fin_matrix_entry[S](n, p, c, k, j)) = fin_matrix_entry[S](m, n, a, i, k) * fin_matrix_entry[S](n, p, b, k, j) + fin_matrix_entry[S](m, n, a, i, k) * fin_matrix_entry[S](n, p, c, k, j)
proof: function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 + x0 * x2 = x0 * (x1 + x2) }[S](fin_matrix_entry[S](m, n, a, i, k), fin_matrix_entry[S](n, p, b, k, j), fin_matrix_entry[S](n, p, c, k, j))

proof: function(x0: lib(fin).Fin[n]) { fin_matrix_mul_term[S](m, n, p, a, b, i, j, x0) = f(x0) }(k)

h(k) = fin_matrix_entry[S](m, n, fin_matrix_add[S](m, n, a, b), i, k) * fin_matrix_entry[S](n, p, c, k, j)

goal: fin_matrix_entry[S](m, n, fin_matrix_add[S](m, n, a, b), i, k) = fin_matrix_entry[S](m, n, a, i, k) + fin_matrix_entry[S](m, n, b, i, k)
proof: function[T0: Add](x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: FinMatrix[T0, x0, x1], x3: lib(fin).Fin[x0], x4: lib(fin).Fin[x1], x5: FinMatrix[T0, x0, x1]) { fin_matrix_entry[T0](x0, x1, x2, x3, x4) + fin_matrix_entry[T0](x0, x1, x5, x3, x4) = fin_matrix_entry[T0](x0, x1, fin_matrix_add[T0](x0, x1, x2, x5), x3, x4) }[S](m, n, a, i, k, b)

goal: (fin_matrix_entry[S](m, n, a, i, k) + fin_matrix_entry[S](m, n, b, i, k)) * fin_matrix_entry[S](n, p, c, k, j) = fin_matrix_entry[S](m, n, a, i, k) * fin_matrix_entry[S](n, p, c, k, j) + fin_matrix_entry[S](m, n, b, i, k) * fin_matrix_entry[S](n, p, c, k, j)
proof: function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 + x2 * x1 = (x0 + x2) * x1 }[S](fin_matrix_entry[S](m, n, a, i, k), fin_matrix_entry[S](n, p, c, k, j), fin_matrix_entry[S](m, n, b, i, k))

goal: f(k) = fin_matrix_entry[S](m, n, a, i, k) * fin_matrix_entry[S](n, p, c, k, j)
proof: function(x0: lib(fin).Fin[n]) { fin_matrix_mul_term[S](m, n, p, a, c, i, j, x0) = f(x0) }(k)

goal: fin_matrix_mul_add_left

fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, fin_matrix_add[A](m, n, a, fin_matrix_add[A](m, n, b, c)), i, j) = fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, a, i, j) + (fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, b, i, j) + fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, c, i, j))

fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, fin_matrix_add[A](m, n, fin_matrix_add[A](m, n, a, b), c), i, j) = fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, a, i, j) + fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, b, i, j) + fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, c, i, j)

fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, a, i, j) + (fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, b, i, j) + fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, c, i, j)) = fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, a, i, j) + fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, b, i, j) + fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, c, i, j)
proof: function[T0: AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }[A](fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, a, i, j), fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, b, i, j), fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, c, i, j))

goal: fin_matrix_add_assoc_at
fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, a, i, j) + fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, b, i, j) = fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, b, i, j) + fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, a, i, j)
proof: function[T0: AddCommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }[A](fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, b, i, j), fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, a, i, j))

goal: fin_matrix_add_comm_at
fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, a, i, j) + A.0 = fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, a, i, j)
proof: function[T0: AddMonoid](x0: T0) { x0 + T0.0 = x0 }[A](fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, a, i, j))

goal: fin_matrix_add_zero_right_at
A.0 + fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, a, i, j) = fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, a, i, j)
proof: function[T0: AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[A](fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, a, i, j))

goal: fin_matrix_add_zero_left_at
fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, a, i, j) + -fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, a, i, j) = A.0
proof: function[T0: AddGroup](x0: T0) { x0 + -x0 = T0.0 }[A](fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, a, i, j))

goal: fin_matrix_add_neg_right_at
fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, a, i, j) - fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, b, i, j) = fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, a, i, j) + -fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, b, i, j)
proof: function[T0: AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[A](fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, a, i, j), fin_matrix_entry[A](m, n, b, i, j))
